title: Jason Collins, NBA's first openly gay player, dies aged 47
snippet: Collins shared late last year that he had been diagnosed with an aggressive form of brain cancer.

title: Air India crisis deepens ahead of final Ahmedabad crash report
snippet: Air India faces a leadership vacuum and mounting financial losses as it struggles to recover from the crash.

title: Daily pill to help keep weight off after stopping obesity jabs
snippet: The tablet - orforglipron - is available in the US and could soon launch in the UK.

title: Smart glasses are 'an invasion of privacy' - Meta's are selling better than ever
snippet: The biggest tech firms are set to sell millions of smart glasses despite growing privacy concerns.

title: Massive Alaska megatsunami was second largest ever recorded
snippet: New research suggests glacier melt driven by climate change is increasing the risk of giant waves.

title: White-tailed eagles to be released in Exmoor despite farmer warnings
snippet: Some farmers fear the reintroduction of the UK's biggest bird of prey will threaten their livestock.

title: Is this the real face of Anne Boleyn?
snippet: A computer science team believes they have discovered a previously unknown sketch of King Henry VIII's second wife - but not everyone is convinced.

title: Tui sees summer sales fall 10% due to cautious UK customers
snippet: The travel operator says customers are delaying booking holidays over Iran war concerns.

title: Australia has some of the world's costliest homes. Will scrapping tax breaks help?
snippet: The government hopes reforms will help young people enter the market, while critics say it will stifle supply.

title: MPs call for sunbed advertising ban to help prevent skin cancer
snippet: A report by a cross-party group of MPs has found the majority of skin cancer cases are preventable.

title: Smart glasses are 'an invasion of privacy' - Meta's are selling better than ever
snippet: The biggest tech firms are set to sell millions of smart glasses despite growing privacy concerns.

title: Thousands of Waymo robotaxis recalled over risk of entering flooded roads
snippet: The voluntary recall follows an incident on 20 April where an empty Waymo car entered a flooded road in San Antonio, Texas.

title: More than 70 million warnings sent to people seeking child abuse material
snippet: The messages highlight the illegality of what people are searching for online and direct them towards help.

title: Glassmaker questions future of UK manufacturing
snippet: Bristol Blue Glass says rising energy costs and taxes have forced its closure.

title: Is this actually what Anne Boleyn looked like?
snippet: An algorithm has suggested images of what were thought to be Anne Boleyn might not be.
